payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. I did not treat the new statement as replacing the old one without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input refers to Sara, matching the existing person entity named Sara, but the stated relationship conflicts with the existing daughter relationship.

details: Detected a direct conflict between existing and new relationship facts.
No durable memory replacement committed without clarification.

repair_options: Confirm Sara is your daughter and discard the niece statement.
Confirm Sara is your niece and replace or supersede the daughter statement.
Clarify whether there are two different people named Sara.
